description:
The DocFx Companion Tools contains a set of utilities for generating documentation from MD-files and source files using DocFx.
    It contains these tools:

    * DocFxTocGenerator - generates a table of contents from a folder-structure with MD-files.
    * DocLinkChecker - a validation tool for checking links and attachments used in MD-files.
    * DocLanguageTranslator - an automatic translator of MD-files using Azure Cognitive Services.
summary: The DocFx Companion Tools contains a set of utilities for generating documentation from MD-files and source files using DocFx.
author: Laurent Ellerbach,  Martin Tirion
